text:
LOGITECH Webcam C100 is shown as
ugen10.3: <product 0x0817 vendor 0x046d> at usbus10, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=HIGH (480Mbps) pwr=ON
After patching 
ugen10.3: <Webcam C100 Logitech> at usbus10, cfg=0 md=HOST spd=HIGH (480Mbps) pwr=ON

Fix: Apply the patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
